questions.question: Describe the key differences between ReLU and Sigmoid activation functions. Provide an example of when to use each.
questions.hint: Both functions are used to introduce non-linearity, but ReLU is more efficient and Sigmoid has an output range of 0 to 1.

questions.question: What is the purpose of batch normalization in a deep neural network? Explain with an example.
questions.hint: Batch normalization helps stabilize the training process and improves the model's overall performance.

questions.question: Compare and contrast Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Fully Connected Neural Networks (FNNs).
questions.hint: CNNs are suitable for image and video data, while FNNs are suited for structured data.
